#!/bin/sh
# Test for null-pointer-config bug
# The server should start and respond correctly when metrics are enabled in config.

set -e

cd /app

# Build the server
go build -o server . 2>&1

# Start the server in the background
./server &
SERVER_PID=$!
sleep 2

cleanup() {
    kill $SERVER_PID 2>/dev/null || true
}
trap cleanup EXIT
